summary: Frontend-only testing completed for authentication and onboarding flow. Successfully verified 3 critical fixes: OTP dialog appears after registration (not immediate dashboard redirect), validateSocialLogin renders Loading component, and registration error handling works correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Language switching to French does not persist when navigating from landing to login page - resets to EN

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly at pod URL with navigation links
Registration page loads with all required fields (First Name, Last Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password, Sign Up button)
Registration form validation works: empty form shows error messages for required fields
✅ CRITICAL SUCCESS: OTP verification dialog appears after successful registration (NOT immediate redirect to dashboard)
OTP dialog shows correct elements: 6 input fields, Resend Code button, Check and Add button
OTP dialog preventClose=true working: cannot be closed by clicking outside or pressing Escape
Login page loads correctly with email input and Continue button
Login page email validation works: shows error messages for empty/invalid email format
Google OAuth button exists on login page with proper Google icon
validateSocialLogin page renders Loading component correctly
Terms-conditions page loads and displays content in current language
Privacy-policy page loads and displays content in current language
Language switching functionality works (can switch to French on landing page)
Registration error handling: form remains editable after error (pendingVerification reset working)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Language switching to French should persist when navigating from landing page to login page. The core authentication fixes are working perfectly - OTP flow, error handling, and social login validation are all functioning as intended.
success_percentage: frontend: 92% - All critical authentication fixes working, minor language persistence issue
